meaning: adj.无情的,冷淡的,硬结的,起老茧的
examples: This makes the action doubly callous.
Thelast question may seem dumb or even callous.
Some men are cold, they're callous and they're mean.
So in my view, neither should that callous killer have been given that luxury.
The University and College Union (UCU) said the memo showed a "callous and uncaring" attitude.
